title: The Love Lottery
writer: Charles Neilson Gattey, Zelma Bramley Moore, Harry Kurnitz
actors: David Niven, Peggy Cummins, Anne Vernon
plot: Rex Allerton is a top Hollywood star and an idol of the female population. To get away from the pressure of the fans who won't leave him alone, he relocates to a remote Italian village where unanticipated trouble arises when unwit...
